---
title: "Embargo Breach: Tracing TenantThread’s AI Crisis"
subtitle: "A Visual Analytics Investigation of the Project HarborCrest Disclosure Failure"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

This project investigates how embargoed merger information from TenantThread was released publicly before its scheduled announcement. Using internal communications, agent deliberations, public posts, and contextual crisis signals, the project develops a Shiny-based visual analytics application to reconstruct the breach and determine whether it was caused by deliberate leakage, abnormal agent behaviour, or a breakdown in coordination across automated communication systems.
